localizedErrorMessagesMapping.VALIDATION_FAILED: The provided data does not meet the technical integrity or security criteria of the ecosystem.
localizedErrorMessagesMapping.UNAUTHORIZED_ACCESS: Your identity does not possess sufficient institutional authority to perform this operation.
localizedErrorMessagesMapping.INTERNAL_SYSTEM_FAILURE: An internal platform collapse has occurred. The Neural Sentinel has already notified the engineering team.
localizedErrorMessagesMapping.RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not identified or has been permanently removed from the data Ledger.
localizedErrorMessagesMapping.EXTERNAL_SERVICE_TIMEOUT: An external infrastructure provider exceeded the latency limit. Please try again.
